lineage_provenance.raw: lion strength 14g (1 2 oz) lion strength is a very special release from capulator. this cross of ( super lemon haze x mac #17) is nothing short of perfection in a flower. she exhibits both traits from her parents leaning more towards slh. the flavor is super strong reeking of lemon meringue pie. this flower is released as a tribute to his pops. from capulator in a post from december 24 2023 "scheduled for takedown tomorrow christmas day. not planned at all and absolutely fitting. rip dad. i'll be putting your spirit in to gardens all over the world". note special capulator jars are not eligible for discounts. featured flower hybrid type 1 flow gardens

effects_provenance.raw: Pipe Dream THCA Flower Essential / 28g (Smalls) Strain Profile Pipe Dream THCA Flower is an aspirational hybrid that delivers an experience so smooth, so flavorful, and so satisfying that it feels almost too good to be true. The cultivar produces dense, well-structured buds with the kind of layered aromatic profile that distinguishes connoisseur-grade flower — bag appeal first with serious flavor depth. Effects Pipe Dream delivers a balanced experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of premium character that lives up to the strain's name. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: layered sweetness up front, with creamy depth through the middle and a smooth lingering finish on the exhale. Smoke is silky and unmistakably premium. The terpene profile is loud and complex — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Pipe Dream harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Pipe Dream THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Pipe Dream THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Cream Earth hybrid Sweet THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Purple Tangie THCA 14 grams Total Cannabinoids: 26.9% THCA: 23% Δ-9 THC: <0.3% Purple Tangie is reported to offer a well-balanced experience, providing a combination of uplifting and euphoric effects from the Tangie lineage, along with a relaxing and mellowing sensation from the Purple Kush lineage. Users often describe feeling happy, creative, and mentally stimulated, making it a popular choice for daytime use and social activities. In its raw form, THCA is non-psychoactive, meaning it does not produce the intoxicating effects commonly associated with THC. However, when exposed to heat, such as through smoking, vaping, or decarboxylation (a process that involves heating the plant material), THCA converts into THC, becoming psychoactive. *Due to the THC present, we recommend that you find what dosage works for you in a comfortable environment and avoid operating heavy machinery.* These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease. All products contain less than 0.3% Δ9 THC. Flower

effects_provenance.raw: Glitter Bomb THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa Shop for Glitter Bomb THCa Flower Glitter Bomb THCa Flower is a heavy indica-leaning hybrid known for its sparkling appearance, sweet berry flavor, and deeply relaxing effects. Created from Grape Gas and OG Kush Breath Blueberry Headband genetics, this strain delivers a flavorful smoke with a smooth, calming finish. From its frosty trichome-covered buds to its blueberry haze aroma, Glitter Bomb is built for slow evenings, laid-back sessions, and full-body relaxation. Glitter Bomb THCa Flower Highlights Type : Indica-Dominant Hybrid (70% Indica / 30% Sativa) Parent Strains : Grape Gas × OG Kush Breath Blueberry Headband Flavors : Blueberry, sweet berry, fruity grape, spicy haze Aroma : Skunky haze, ripe blueberries, herbal spice Terpenes : Myrcene, Caryophyllene, Linalool THCa : 28.02% Effects : Calming, happy, relaxing, uplifting Usage : Best suited for evening or nighttime use What is Glitter Bomb THCa Flower? Glitter Bomb is a modern indica hybrid known for its loud aroma, heavy trichome production, and powerful relaxing effects. Its oversized buds feature dark olive green tones, bright orange hairs, and a shimmering layer of crystal trichomes that give the strain its signature “glitter” appearance. Flavor-wise, Glitter Bomb leans sweet and fruity with blueberry and grape notes layered over skunky floral haze and herbal spice. Glitter Bomb THCa Effects Glitter Bomb delivers a fast-moving euphoric lift followed by deep physical relaxation. The experience starts mentally before slowly melting through the body, making it ideal for unwinding at the end of the day. Euphoric mental calm Relaxed and peaceful body feel Mood elevation without mental fog Great for slow evenings and couch sessions Glitter Bomb Cannabinoids THCa : 28.02% Δ9-THC : 0.229% Total Cannabinoids : 29.948% Glitter Bomb Terpenes Myrcene : Earthy and calming with strong body relaxation Caryophyllene : Spicy and grounding with warm herbal depth Linalool : Floral and soothing with calming properties How to Use Glitter Bomb THCa Flower Enjoy Glitter Bomb through smoking or dry herb vaporizing. Its rich terpene profile and dessert-style flavor make it ideal for slow sessions and evening wind-downs. Store in an airtight container away from heat and light for maximum freshness. Why Choose Hemp Hop for Glitter Bomb THCa Flower Premium indoor or greenhouse-grown flower Rich terpene profiles with high T

effects_provenance.raw: Skywalker OG – THCa Flower Size: 3.5g, Quantity:: 1 Pack Premium THCa Hemp Flower Skywalker (Indica Dominant) 37.7% Total THCa 100% Naturally Grown 3rd Party Lab Tested Federal Farm Bill Compliant *** We do not ship to California. *** Skywalker OG THCa Flower is a legendary Indica-dominant Hybrid strain that delivers a potent and classic experience. Its pungent and earthy flavor with hints of pine offers a satisfyingly robust taste with every draw. Skywalker OG’s impressive profile results from crossing Skywalker and OG Kush, two strains celebrated for their potency and distinctive OG aroma. The strong aroma is a blend of diesel, spice, and earthy pine, creating a classic and inviting fragrance. This potent Indica-dominant hybrid clocks in at 37.7% THCa, delivering powerful relaxation and a blissful cerebral effect. Perfect for unwinding after a long day, Skywalker OG offers deep calm without necessarily leading to complete sedation. This strain also boasts visually appealing buds, often featuring deep green hues with hints of purple and a generous coating of frosty trichomes. We submit each batch of our premium USA-grown Skywalker OG THCa Flower for third-party lab testing to verify its potency and Farm Bill compliance. When you want a robust smoking experience that delivers soothing physical effects and a touch of cerebral euphoria without heavy sedation, explore this iconic Indica-dominant hybrid that remains a beloved classic. **This product is not available for shipment to the following states: Hawaii, Idaho, Minnesota, Oregon, Rhode Island, Utah, Vermont. effects_provenance.raw: Durban Poison 28g (1 oz) Durban Poison is a renowned sativa strain celebrated for its uplifting effects. Originating from South Africa, it features a sweet and spicy flavor profile with anise undertones, and its aroma is characterized by earthiness and hints of citrus. The strain's energetic high and mood-enhancing properties make it a favorite among cannabis enthusiasts. The breeder of the original Durban Poison is not widely documented due to its landrace origins. This pure sativa strain has a rich lineage dating back to South African cannabis varieties, contributing to its unique and sought-after characteristics. Flower Type 1 Flow Gardens

effects_provenance.raw: Apple Scotti - THCA Flower - Indoor Gold Nuggets Exotic 28 GRAMS Apple Scotti – A Flavorful Adventure with an Indica-Leaning Hybrid Apple Scotti, an enticing indica-leaning hybrid, is known for its unique blend of sweet and tangy flavors paired with its soothing effects. This strain enchants the senses with notes of crisp green apple, bakery-like sweetness, and subtle hints of earth and spice. Perfect for unwinding after a long day or embracing quiet introspection, Apple Scotti provides a deeply relaxing experience without feeling overwhelming. Terpene Profile Apple Scotti’s captivating taste and calming effects are shaped by its rich and diverse terpene profile: Limonene : Brings bright citrus and apple-like freshness, boosting mood and focus. Caryophyllene : Offers a spicy, peppery kick that promotes relaxation and eases stress. Myrcene : Provides earthy herbal notes, helping to soothe the body and promote calm. Effects Apple Scotti begins with a subtle cerebral uplift, creating a sense of mental clarity and happiness. As the high progresses, the strain’s indica qualities emerge, offering profound relaxation and comfort for both the mind and body. Apple Scotti is an excellent choice for easing tension, promoting rest, or simply enjoying a peaceful evening. Dive into the crisp, sweet flavors and tranquil effects of Apple Scotti—a strain that pairs indulgent notes with serene relaxation. Whether for stress relief, reflection, or a calming break, this indica-leaning hybrid will transport you to a place of comfort and calm. Out of stock retail flower Gold Standard

effects_provenance.raw: Double Runtz THCA Flower Preferred / 28g Strain Profile Double Runtz THCA Flower is a candy lover's dream — delivering twice the sweetness and twice the potency of your average strain in one trichome-drenched experience. Born from elite Runtz genetics, the cultivar produces dense, frost-coated buds with an aromatic profile that doubles down on candy-fruit character with serious depth. Effects Double Runtz delivers a balanced experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of bright character that distinguishes premium Runtz cultivars. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sugary fruit candy up front, with creamy tropical fruit through the middle and a vanilla-rich finish on the exhale. Smoke is silky and unmistakably bright. The terpene profile reads candy-and-tropical — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Double Runtz harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Double Runtz THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Double Runtz THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Candy Fruit indica Sugar THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Trop Cherry 28g (1 oz) Trop Cherry is a vibrant, Sativa-leaning strain that’s as visually stunning as it is flavorful. Its buds showcase deep merlot-purple and red hues with bright orange highlights, making it a feast for the eyes. The aroma is intoxicating, with sweet cherry, tangerine, and gas notes that carry through to the flavor. The high is uplifting and energetic, perfect for creative sessions, socializing, or adding a spark to your day. effects_provenance.raw: Apples and Bananas - THCA Flower - Greenhouse Top Cut 28 GRAMS Apples and Bananas – Sativa-Dominant Hybrid Cannabis Strain Apples and Bananas is a sativa-dominant hybrid celebrated for its sweet and tropical aroma featuring vibrant notes of fresh apples and ripe bananas. This strain offers a flavorful and refreshing taste with energizing and creative effects. Type: Sativa-Dominant Hybrid Cannabis Strain for Uplifting and Motivating Effects As a sativa-dominant hybrid, Apples and Bananas provides a lively cerebral high that enhances creativity and focus while delivering a subtle physical relaxation. It’s an excellent choice for daytime activities that require mental clarity and motivation. Apples and Bananas Terpene Profile – Sweet, Tropical, and Fruity Aromas The primary terpenes are: Limonene: Bright citrus aroma uplifting mood and reducing stress. Myrcene: Earthy and musky notes that encourage gentle relaxation. Pinene: Fresh pine scent which supports alertness and mental sharpness. Terpinolene: Herbal and floral undertones adding complexity to the aroma. These terpenes blend to create Apples and Bananas’ distinctive sweet fruit aroma complemented by herbal and piney accents. Effects of Apples and Bananas – Energizing Mental Clarity with Light Body Ease Apples and Bananas offers an invigorating cerebral uplift that fosters creativity and focus paired with mild body relaxation to ease tension without drowsiness. This makes it ideal for boosting productivity and social engagement throughout the day. Experience the vibrant aroma and energizing effects of Apples and Bananas — a sativa-dominant hybrid designed to awaken your mind and refresh your body. CALM CARYOPHYLLENE FOCUSED LIMONENE MYRCENE nostalgia Out of stock retail flower Sungrown UPLIFTED UPLIFTING Gold Standard
